description: CompositionLight purple sleeveless blouse, made of 68% cotton, 27% polyamide and 5% elastane,  full buttoned placket, and embroidered brand name next to the hemFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cool water at 30 CUse mild detergentDo not scrubDo not bleachDo not tumble dryDo not wringDo not dry in direct sunlightCool ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryWash, dry and iron inside outDo not dry cleanLook chic and stylish in this semi-formal light purple blouse from s.oliver. With a mix of polyamide and elastane, it is guaranteed to Fit you well. Team it with corduroys or jeans, and look like the smart chick that you are.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
